nodes.title: Tactical COP (Grok-refined): battlespace-manager operator picture
nodes.description:
Refined from Grok review: https://grok.com/share/c2hhcmQtMg_28836953-c53c-4879-865f-ef40890a1a41

Adapted to existing stack (not greenfield Vue):
- battlespace-display + entity-display (Svelte 5, Vite)
- Leaflet map with manual marker Map updates (Grok shallowRef pattern)
- FastAPI /api/picture + SSE /api/stream (GulfWarEngine; o-my Redis for entity-display)
- F2T2EA workflow rails already present

Grok priorities retained: sub-second updates, MIL-STD-2525D symbology (milsymbol), offline picture cache, RBAC gating, tactical HUD, TDD increments.

Deferred: full MapLibre migration, offline vector tiles (PMTiles), greenfield Pinia/Dexie app.

nodes.title: Phase 0: Foundation, Track model & test harness
nodes.description: Grok Phase 0 adapted: typed Track contract + pytest harness before UI. No new Vue repo — extend battlespace-manager services.

nodes.title: 0.1 ADR: COP stack mapping (Grok → battlespace-manager)
nodes.description: Document mapping: shallowRef→Svelte manual Map markers; WebSocket→SSE; Pinia→picture state; Vue→Svelte 5; MapLibre evaluation deferred. File: docs/adr/001-tactical-cop-stack.md
nodes.acceptance: ADR committed; links Grok share URL and lists Leaflet-now / MapLibre-later decision.

nodes.title: 0.2 Track TypeScript interface + Zod schema
nodes.description: TDD: define Track { id, sidc?, force, lat, lon, heading?, speed?, timestamp, metadata } in battlespace-display/web/src/types/track.ts; map from picture.entities fields (affiliation→force, entity_id→id).
nodes.acceptance: Vitest or node test: sample entity maps to Track; invalid payload rejected by Zod.

nodes.title: 0.3 Picture schema contract test (/api/picture)
nodes.description: TDD red: pytest asserts required keys (entities, threat_picture, mission_thread, attention_queue, fkcm_targets, timeline_view, task_rows) at T+15 fixture.
nodes.acceptance: services/battlespace-display/api/tests/test_picture_contract.py passes.

nodes.title: 0.4 scripts/run-display-tests.sh
nodes.description: Single entrypoint: API pytest + web unit tests + npm run build.
nodes.acceptance: ./scripts/run-display-tests.sh exits 0 from repo root.

nodes.title: Phase 1: Map + MIL-STD-2525 symbology
nodes.description: Grok Phase 1: milsymbol on battlespace map, force color coding, clickable track popup, HUD track count.

nodes.title: 1.1 milsymbol integration (affiliation → SIDC)
nodes.description: TDD: symbolRenderer.ts maps OPFOR/COALITION/neutral + domain to milsymbol SIDC; returns data URL for Leaflet L.icon.
nodes.acceptance: Unit test: blue air, red surface, unknown ground produce distinct symbol URLs.

nodes.title: 1.2 Battlespace map: milsymbol markers + entity popup
nodes.description: Replace/augment circleMarker with milsymbol icons up to MAP_ENTITY_CAP; popup shows force, heading, speed, confidence, last report sim time.
nodes.acceptance: Playwright frame at T+15 shows symbols; click opens popup fields.

nodes.title: 1.3 HUD: track count + last-update latency
nodes.description: Extend header stats with SSE latency ms since last picture event; test threat_picture.entity_count matches map markers.
nodes.acceptance: test_threat_picture_header.py; latency visible in UI when stream connected.

nodes.title: Phase 2: Real-time telemetry pipeline (no thrashing)
nodes.description: Grok Phase 2 adapted to SSE: upsert entities in Map, avoid full picture reactive churn.

nodes.title: 2.1 SSE /api/stream contract test
nodes.description: TDD: TestClient reads first SSE event; JSON parses; entities array present.
nodes.acceptance: test_stream_picture_event.py green.

nodes.title: 2.2 Manual marker upsert pattern (shallowRef equivalent)
nodes.description: Refactor updateMap() to upsert/remove by entity_id Map without recreating picture reactive graph; document in ADR.
nodes.acceptance: Unit or perf note: 300-entity tick updates markers in place; no full entities array reassignment in hot path.

nodes.title: 2.3 Geofencing stub (@turf/turf)
nodes.description: TDD: turf point-in-polygon for sample TST/SCUD bbox; emit attention-style flag in dev mock or client-only overlay.
nodes.acceptance: test_geofence_stub.py or vitest: entity inside bbox returns true.

nodes.title: Phase 3: Temporal COP (timeline)
nodes.description: Timeline shipped on main; harden with TDD. Grok did not cover temporal axis — battlespace-manager differentiator.

nodes.title: 3.1 Extend timeline_view unit tests
nodes.description: TDD: task statuses, imminent window, sort order, upcoming cap in test_timeline.py.
nodes.acceptance: pytest test_timeline.py covers merge edge cases.

nodes.title: 3.2 Timeline Playwright smoke + Tasks stat nav
nodes.description: Capture timeline frame; Tasks stat opens timeline; card click focuses entity on map.
nodes.acceptance: capture-gulfwar-playwright.py includes timeline; click wiring tested.

nodes.title: Phase 4: F2T2EA workflow COP
nodes.description: Kill chain phase rail, attention assign workflow (o-my-sim-r2z), cross-tab entity selection.

nodes.title: 4.1 Phase rail → Kill chain filter tests
nodes.description: TDD: phase_counts[Find] == filtered fkcm_targets when phaseFilter=Find; URL ?tab=killchain&phase=Find.
nodes.acceptance: test_killchain_phase_filter.py + deep link load test.

nodes.title: 4.2 Attention candidates + assign API (TDD)
nodes.description: Red: POST /api/attention/{id}/candidates and POST /api/attention/assign using task_allocator.select_best_platform.
nodes.acceptance: test_attention_candidates.py + test_attention_assign.py at T+15.

nodes.title: 4.3 AttentionRail assign panel UI
nodes.description: Show next F2T2EA step + ranked platforms + confirm; Playwright CUSTODY→assign.
nodes.acceptance: E2E assign flow; queue item downgraded.

nodes.title: 4.4 Cross-tab entity selection contract
nodes.description: TDD: timeline/killchain/attention selection sets selectedEntityId and pans map.
nodes.acceptance: Documented selectEntity behavior; Playwright or harness test.

nodes.title: Phase 5: Offline resilience (data first)
nodes.description: Grok Phase 3 scoped: IndexedDB picture cache + offline HUD; defer full tile offline and action queue sync.

nodes.title: 5.1 IndexedDB last-picture cache (idb-keyval or dexie)
nodes.description: TDD: on each SSE picture, persist snapshot; on load offline, hydrate UI from cache.
nodes.acceptance: Vitest with fake indexedDB: round-trip picture JSON.

nodes.title: 5.2 Offline mode indicator in HUD
nodes.description: Show disconnected/stale when SSE drops; timestamp of last good picture.
nodes.acceptance: Simulate EventSource error; HUD shows offline state.

nodes.title: Phase 6: RBAC & clearance gating
nodes.description: Grok Phase 4: mock clearance removes classified panels from DOM (Sources, raw tracks, advisor).

nodes.title: 6.1 Mock clearance store + dev role switcher
nodes.description: clearanceLevel 1-3 in localStorage; dev dropdown in footer.
nodes.acceptance: Switching role updates visible tabs without reload.

nodes.title: 6.2 Tab/panel gating tests (classified DOM removal)
nodes.description: TDD: clearance<3 hides Sources tab and raw_tracks from picture render path.
nodes.acceptance: Vitest: gated tabs not in DOM at low clearance.

nodes.title: Phase 7: UX polish (Grok Phase 5)
nodes.description: MGRS, track search/filter, speed vectors, export, tactical theme pass.

nodes.title: 7.1 MGRS / Lat-Lon coordinate toggle
nodes.description: mgrs npm package; entity popup and map cursor readout.
nodes.acceptance: Toggle converts sample Kuwait coords correctly (unit test).

nodes.title: 7.2 Track filter / search panel
nodes.description: Filter map by affiliation, domain, callsign substring.
nodes.acceptance: Filter reduces visible markers; count in HUD updates.

nodes.title: 7.3 Export current COP (GeoJSON + screenshot)
nodes.description: Download entities as GeoJSON; reuse capture script for PNG.
nodes.acceptance: Export button produces valid GeoJSON FeatureCollection.

nodes.title: 7.4 Speed vectors / heading on symbols
nodes.description: milsymbol modifiers or Leaflet polyline stub for velocity vector when heading+speed present.
nodes.acceptance: Selected entity shows vector line proportional to speed.

nodes.title: Phase 8: Dual-display integration & exit
nodes.description: entity-display (:8080) + battlespace-display (:8081); compat; docs; all tests green.

nodes.title: 8.1 entity-display symbology parity spike
nodes.description: Port milsymbol renderer to entity-display ADS-B tracks (category→SIDC); keep commlink overlays.
nodes.acceptance: entity-display map shows milsymbol icons for sample tracks.

nodes.title: 8.2 Compat banner (tested-against o-my 0.2.0)
nodes.description: Both displays read compat/tested-against.json; warn on mismatch.
nodes.acceptance: Banner visible on both :8080 and :8081.

nodes.title: 8.3 Load test: 300+ entity SSE updates
nodes.description: Grok Phase 6 scoped: script or pytest drives engine with dense entities; measure update latency.
nodes.acceptance: Document p95 marker update ms with 300 entities.

nodes.title: 8.4 Update COP walkthrough docs + screenshots
nodes.description: O-MY-WALKTHROUGH + DISPLAY-METRICS: symbology, timeline, attention assign path.
nodes.acceptance: capture-o-my-walkthrough.sh produces updated frames.

nodes.title: 8.5 Roadmap exit: run-display-tests.sh green
nodes.description: All phase beads closed; CI harness green.
nodes.acceptance: ./scripts/run-display-tests.sh green; bd ready shows no open cop tasks.

nodes.title: Phase 9 (deferred): MapLibre / high-density / offline tiles
nodes.description: Grok Phase 7 — only after MVP. MapLibre spike, Canvas/WebGL layer for 500-2000 tracks, PMTiles offline basemap.

nodes.title: 9.1 ADR spike: MapLibre vs Leaflet at 500 tracks
nodes.description: Branch spike comparing symbol layer FPS; recommendation only, no mandatory migration.
nodes.acceptance: ADR with benchmark numbers and go/no-go.
